display.purpose: Hero h1 only. System sans at weight 600, tight negative tracking.

label.purpose: Section kickers, tags, stat labels, all machine-voice metadata. Monospace, uppercase, tracked.

shadows.name: shadow-terminal
shadows.purpose: The hero terminal only — marks the page's primary evidence object.

shadows.name: shadow-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Appears on feature-card :hover, paired with translateY(-1px).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Theme view-transition crossfade (320ms) and default state transitions.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Nav collapses to menu button; hero grid stacks to one column.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Hero h1 clamp drops; feature/audience grids go single column.

themes.strategy: data-theme attribute on :root with prefers-color-scheme fallback; no-FOUC bootstrap script; view-transition crossfade on toggle.
themes.light: Paper oklch(99%) bg, Ink oklch(18%) text, accent oklch(55% 0.18 255).
themes.dark: oklch(14%) bg, oklch(96%) text, accent brightened to oklch(70% 0.16 255).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Highest-emphasis inverted action: Ink fill, Paper text.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 15px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .06s ease, background .15s, border-color .15s; } .ds-btn:active { transform: translateY(0.5px); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(55% 0.18 255); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(18% 0.012 250); color: oklch(99% 0.002 240); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(28% 0.014 250); }

components.name: Accent Button
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { background: oklch(55% 0.18 255); color: oklch(99% 0 0); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: oklch(49% 0.18 255); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: hairline border, fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(18% 0.012 250); border-color: oklch(92% 0.005 250); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(97.5% 0.003 250); border-color: oklch(85% 0.007 250); }

components.name: Section Kicker
components.description: The mono Prompt-Blue wayfinding kicker above a section title. One per section, never decorative.
components.css: .ds-kicker { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: ui-monospace, 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.09em; color: oklch(55% 0.18 255); font-weight: 500; } .ds-kicker::before { content: ''; width: 14px; height: 1px; background: oklch(55% 0.18 255); opacity: 0.55; }

components.name: Tag
components.description: Mono capability tag under how-it-works steps. Static, pill-shaped.
components.css: .ds-tag { font-family: ui-monospace, 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(54% 0.012 250); padding: 3px 7px; background: oklch(97.5% 0.003 250); border: 1px solid oklch(92% 0.005 250); border-radius: 999px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Flat-at-rest card; lifts on hover. Leads with a tinted Prompt-Blue icon tile.
components.html:
Cross-project memory

Decisions and solved bugs live in one KB, not siloed per repo.
components.css: .ds-feature { background: oklch(100% 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(92% 0.005 250); border-radius: 14px; padding: 22px 22px 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; transition: border-color .18s ease, transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease; } .ds-feature:hover { border-color: oklch(85% 0.007 250); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px oklch(20% 0.012 250 / 0.06); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-feature-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(97.5% 0.003 250); border: 1px solid oklch(92% 0.005 250); display: grid; place-items: center; color: oklch(55% 0.18 255); } .ds-feature-icon svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .ds-feature h3 { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.012em; margin: 0; color: oklch(18% 0.012 250); } .ds-feature p { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(54% 0.012 250); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; margin: 0; } .ds-feature p strong { color: oklch(32% 0.012 250); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Hero Eyebrow
components.description: Status pill above the hero h1 with a live-dot.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 11px 4px 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(92% 0.005 250); border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(100% 0 0); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; color: oklch(54% 0.012 250); } .ds-eyebrow strong { color: oklch(32% 0.012 250); font-weight: 600; } .ds-eyebrow-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(58% 0.14 152); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(58% 0.14 152) 22%, transparent); margin-left: 4px; }

components.name: Terminal Demo
components.description: Signature hero object: a real scribe run on a dark slate card with ANSI-colored output and a blinking caret. The only thing on the page allowed a deep shadow.
components.html:
scribe sync
scribe sync --sessions✓ mined 3 sessions (BM25 pre-filter)absorbed 11 articles
components.css: .ds-term { background: oklch(20% 0.014 250); border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.014 250); box-shadow: 0 1px 1px oklch(20% 0.012 250 / 0.04), 0 10px 30px oklch(20% 0.012 250 / 0.10), 0 28px 60px oklch(20% 0.012 250 / 0.08); } .ds-term-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 11px 14px; background: oklch(24% 0.014 250); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.014 250); } .ds-term-dot { width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(40% 0.01 250); } .ds-term-dot:nth-child(1) { background: oklch(62% 0.16 30); } .ds-term-dot:nth-child(2) { background: oklch(78% 0.14 90); } .ds-term-dot:nth-child(3) { background: oklch(70% 0.14 150); } .ds-term-title { flex: 1; text-align: center; color: oklch(64% 0.01 240); font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; } .ds-term-body { padding: 18px; color: oklch(94% 0.005 240); font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 13.25px; line-height: 1.65; } .ds-term-body .ds-line { display: block; white-space: pre-wrap; } .ds-term-body .u { color: oklch(78% 0.15 150); } .ds-term-body .ok { color: oklch(78% 0.15 150); } .ds-term-body .key { color: oklch(78% 0.10 220); } .ds-term-body .dim { color: oklch(64% 0.01 240); } .ds-term-body .caret { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 14px; background: oklch(94% 0.005 240); vertical-align: -2px; animation: ds-blink 1s steps(1, end) infinite; } @keyframes ds-blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

narrative.overview: scribe's surface behaves like a careful researcher's bound notebook: dated, measured, and unwilling to assert anything it can't back with a figure. The page is a bright, near-white workspace where the only things that raise their voice are the evidence — a dark terminal showing a real run, monospace metadata carrying exact numbers, and a single blue accent that marks what matters. This is a product-register surface, not a brand campaign: design serves the message, restraint is the floor, and the interface disappears into the content the way scribe disappears into your cron schedule.
keyCharacteristics: Evidence over adjectives: numbers in tabular mono, a live terminal, a knowledge-graph backdrop — not slogans.
One accent (Prompt Blue), spent sparingly on state and emphasis, never as decoration.
Flat, bordered surfaces; shadow is reserved for the hero terminal and interaction.
System-native type (no webfonts) plus a monospace voice for all metadata and labels.
OKLCH throughout, dual light/dark themes, reduced-motion honored.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Prompt Blue is the only saturated color outside the terminal. It appears on a small fraction of any screen; its rarity is what makes it read as 'look here.' Never add a second accent hue — add emphasis with weight, size, or a number.

rules.name: The True-White-Not-Cream Rule
rules.body: The body background is oklch(99% 0.002 240) — near-zero chroma, faintly cool. It is never warmed toward beige/sand/cream.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: The system sans is for humans; the monospace is for machines and metadata. A label that names a number, command, tag, or file is mono.

rules.name: The One-Kicker Rule
rules.body: The mono Prompt-Blue kicker labels a section once, as a deliberate wayfinding system — never stacked with a second eyebrow, never decorative mid-section.

rules.name: The Earned-Kicker Rule
rules.body: A kicker only appears when it adds a frame the heading does not already carry. When the heading already names the topic, the kicker is dropped — it rides 7 of 10 sections, not every section. An eyebrow on every section is the AI-grammar tell this prevents.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, tags, and inputs are flat with a hairline border until interacted with. The terminal demo is the only standing exception, because it is the literal subject of the page.

dos: Do keep Prompt Blue as the only saturated color outside the terminal — spend it on state, links, and one emphasized word, never as fill-for-interest.
Do set every number, command, tag, file path, and label in the monospace voice with tabular-nums.
Do keep surfaces flat with 1px hairline borders at rest; let only the terminal and hover states carry shadow.
Do hold body prose to 58-75ch and lead large headings with text-wrap pretty/balance and negative tracking.
Do keep the body background a near-zero-chroma cool white; carry both themes through every contrast check.
Do add a visible, non-color-only :focus-visible ring to every interactive element (the shipped CSS currently lacks this).
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS template: no gradient hero, no three identical icon+heading+text cards, no pricing-tier grid, no big-number hero-metric block, no 'Trusted by' logo wall.
Don't drift into AI-startup slop: no purple/violet gradients, no decorative glassmorphism, no emoji bullets, and never background-clip:text gradient text.
Don't go corporate/enterprise: no stock-photo people, no navy-and-gold, no buzzword soup.
Don't go over-designed editorial: no display-serif + italic drop caps + broadsheet grid.
Don't warm the neutrals toward cream/sand/beige, or introduce a second accent hue.
Don't put a drop shadow on a resting card, stack a second eyebrow above the mono kicker, or use a >1px colored side-stripe border.
